languages.text: {n}Ледяной тон пробирает до самых костей: женщина вздрагивает и переводит взгляд на вас, будто впервые осознает, кто именно с ней говорит.{/n}
{n}Your tone is cold enough the chill the bones: the woman flinches and looks at you, as if realising for the first time exactly who is talking to her.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Ледяной тон пробирает до самых костей: женщина вздрагивает и переводит взгляд на вас, будто впервые осознает, кто именно с ней говорит.{/n}

{n}Your tone is cold enough the chill the bones: the woman flinches and looks at you, as if realising for the first time exactly who is talking to her.{/n}
{n}Your tone is cold enough the chill the bones: the woman flinches and looks at you, as if realising for the first time exactly who is talking to her.{/n}

languages.text: {n}あなたの口調は骨まで凍りつくほど冷たかった。その女性は身を引き、あなたを見つめた。まるで初めて、あなたと話す相手が誰であることに気づいたかのように。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Your tone is cold enough the chill the bones: the woman flinches and looks at you, as if realising for the first time exactly who is talking to her.{/n}

traits.locale_text: あなたの口調は骨まで凍りつくほど冷たかった。その女性は身を引き、あなたを見つめた。まるで初めて、あなたと話す相手が誰であることに気づいたかのように。

languages.text: {n}Ses tonun, iliklerine kadar donduracak kadar soğuk. Kadın, sanki onunla konuşanın tam olarak kim olduğunu yeni fark ediyormuş gibi irkilip sana bakıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Your tone is cold enough the chill the bones: the woman flinches and looks at you, as if realising for the first time exactly who is talking to her.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Ses tonun, iliklerine kadar donduracak kadar soğuk. Kadın, sanki onunla konuşanın tam olarak kim olduğunu yeni fark ediyormuş gibi irkilip sana bakıyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Tu tono es tan frío que cala en los huesos: la mujer se encoge y te mira, como si comprendiera por vez primera con quién está hablando.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Your tone is cold enough the chill the bones: the woman flinches and looks at you, as if realising for the first time exactly who is talking to her.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Tu tono es tan frío que cala en los huesos: la mujer se encoge y te mira, como si comprendiera por vez primera con quién está hablando.{/n}

languages.text: {n}你的语气冷得彻骨。女人瑟缩了一下，看向你，仿佛才意识到跟她说话的是谁。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Your tone is cold enough the chill the bones: the woman flinches and looks at you, as if realising for the first time exactly who is talking to her.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}你的语气冷得彻骨。女人瑟缩了一下，看向你，仿佛才意识到跟她说话的是谁。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Votre ton glacial fait tressaillir la femme, qui vous regarde comme si elle venait de réaliser à qui elle avait affaire.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Your tone is cold enough the chill the bones: the woman flinches and looks at you, as if realising for the first time exactly who is talking to her.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Votre ton glacial fait tressaillir la femme, qui vous regarde comme si elle venait de réaliser à qui elle avait affaire.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Dein Ton ist so kalt, dass er bis in die Knochen fährt. Die Frau zuckt zusammen und sieht dich an, als würde sie erst jetzt genau erkennen, wer da mit ihr spricht.{/n}
